---
name: New Binding Proposal
about: Propose a new platform binding
title: "[Binding] "
labels: binding, enhancement
---

**Target platform**
Name and link to the platform/tool.

**Config format**
What configuration format does the platform use? (Markdown, JSON, YAML, TOML, etc.)

**Directory structure**
Where do config files live? Example:
```
.platform/
  agents/
  config.json
```

**Documentation**
Link to the platform's official configuration docs.

**Why this platform?**
How many people use it? Why should AgenTopology support it?
